title: PG Connection Pool Surface Map
consumer_purpose: Understand how PG connections are created, configured, closed, and error-handled across all storage modules
claim_atoms: Pool creations at db.pg.ts:18 and db.duckdb.ts:198; two config schemes (db.pg.ts inline vs DuckDBConnectionPool constructor); three close patterns ($client.close()
underlying.end()); retry in adapter.ts:246-250 for serialization failures only; no retry on init/connection failure
content: Structured map of PG connection pool surface area for packages/opencode/src/storage/
